## Summary

<!-- One to three sentences describing the change. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why this change, linked to an issue or blog post if relevant. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New sample
- [ ] New review skill
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] The sample or skill is self-contained and free of proprietary context.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data are present in the diff.
- [ ] If `site/` changed, `npm run build` succeeds locally.
- [ ] If a skill changed, the frontmatter-plus-six-named-sections shape from `CONTRIBUTING.md` is preserved.
- [ ] The PR title uses conventional-commit format: `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `sample:`, `skill:`, `site:`, `ci:`, `refactor:`, or `test:`. The `pr-hygiene` check enforces this.

## Related reading

<!-- Links to the blog post, issue, or external documentation that motivate
     this change. -->
